info.name: KS Clinic API
info.description:
This collection contains the core endpoints for the KS Clinic API, covering authentication, region management, user management, doctor availability, and patient appointment workflows.

It is organized into functional folders for:

- Auth: user registration and login
    
- Region: retrieving and creating clinic regions
    
- Users: viewing, updating, and deleting user profiles
    
- Doctor: retrieving doctors by region, checking schedules, adding schedules, and viewing available slots
    
- Appointments: creating patient bookings, retrieving bookings, viewing appointment details, and canceling appointments
    

The collection uses collection variables such as `{{main_url}}` and `{{accessToken}}` to simplify environment configuration and authenticated requests. Overall, it serves as a central workspace for testing and managing the main clinic booking and scheduling flows.
